response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 12 years of relevant work, including roles at re:cinq and Optilyz where he built scalable systems using the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, React, Vitest) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). His work spans frontend, backend, cloud, and AI-agent development, with a strong focus on clean, testable code and user experience. He also has leadership in open-source projects and mentorship through workshops.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with modern and legacy stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js, Kotlin/Java)
Proven ability to design scalable systems and optimize performance (e.g., low-latency apps, pricing optimization for millions of mails)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, workshops)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Vitest (primary stack requirement) in listed projects
Primary stack in recent roles (Optilyz, re:cinq) aligns but not all projects explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest
Some roles focus on non-UI work (e.g., Dlang, embedded systems) which may not reflect current frontend depth
